env._NOTE_RETRY_TUNING: Bulk re-embed retry tuning: raised pending cap + max-age + faster batch/interval so a large embedding backlog drains instead of being parked as failed (defaults park excess/old pending: cap 1000, 24h age, 5-per-5min).
env._NOTE_1_DB: Default DB: context-index__llama-cpp__unsloth-embeddinggemma-300m-gguf__768__q8.sqlite (auto-derived from provider+model+dim+dtype; hf-local ONNX q8 is the fallback).
env._NOTE_2_TOOLS: Registers 35 tools across families (verified against mcp_server/tool-schemas.ts): memory_save/search/context/match_triggers/index_scan/stats/health/validate/update/delete/bulk_delete/list/drift_why/retention_sweep/get_learning_history/quick_search (16 memory), memory_causal_link/causal_stats (2 causal), memory_ingest_start/status/cancel (3 async ingest), embedder_list/set/status (3 embedder), session_bootstrap/resume/health (3 session), checkpoint_create/list/restore/delete (4 checkpoint), task_preflight/postflight (2 task), eval_run_ablation/reporting_dashboard (2 eval). MCP namespace: mcp__mk_spec_memory__*. Note: coverage-graph and council graph operations are owned by deep-loop-runtime CLI modules and are NOT exposed as MCP tools.
env._NOTE_3_PROVIDERS: Auto cascade: VOYAGE_API_KEY -> OPENAI_API_KEY -> llama-cpp (GGUF Q8_0 + Metal) -> hf-local (ONNX q8 fallback).
env._NOTE_4_EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER: Auto cascade: VOYAGE_API_KEY -> OPENAI_API_KEY -> llama-cpp (when GGUF runtime installed) -> hf-local. Set EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER=<provider> to force a specific provider.
env._NOTE_5_CLOUD_PROVIDERS: Cloud tiers are explicit opt-in: add VOYAGE_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY only when you want cloud embeddings; otherwise the cascade keeps everything local. Voyage is embeddings-only here; cloud rerankers (voyage/cohere) were removed in 022/013.
env._NOTE_8_FEATURE_FLAGS: Opt-out flags (default ON): SPECKIT_ADAPTIVE_FUSION, SPECKIT_SESSION_BOOST, SPECKIT_CAUSAL_BOOST, SPECKIT_HYDE_ACTIVE, SPECKIT_ENTITY_LINKING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_CONCEPT_ROUTING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_REFRESH_MODE=write_local. Tier 3 LLM save routing is always on (fail-open to Tier 2 on timeout).
env._NOTE_AUTO_MIGRATION: Auto-migration: hf-local sqlite + llama-cpp active -> daemon re-embeds + deletes source. Opt out: MEMORY_AUTO_MIGRATE_HF_TO_LLAMA=false.

env._NOTE_1_DB: Database lives at .opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/database/skill-graph.sqlite by default; MK_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR overrides, with SYSTEM_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR as a legacy fallback.
env._NOTE_2_TOOLS: Registers 9 tools (8 public + 1 internal trusted-caller): advisor_recommend/rebuild/status/validate plus skill_graph_scan/query/status/validate/propagate_enhances. MCP namespace: mcp__mk_skill_advisor__*

env._NOTE_1_DB: Database lives at .opencode/.spec-kit/code-graph/database/code-graph.sqlite by default; SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_DB_DIR overrides.
env._NOTE_2_TOOLS: Registers 8 tools: code_graph_scan/query/classify_query_intent/context/status/verify/apply, detect_changes. MCP namespace: mcp__mk_code_index__*
env._NOTE_3_INDEX_DEFAULTS: INDEX_* committed defaults are false (end-user safe). Maintainer mode: set SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_MAINTAINER_MODE=true in .env.local (gitignored); the launcher will force all 5 INDEX_* to true at startup. Per-call code_graph_scan args (includeSkills, includeAgents, includeCommands, includeSpecs, includePlugins) still override env for fine-grained control.
